name: Shelkopolis
approach: Pale stone walls rise from meadows with golden accents, indigo and emerald banners, and flower-lined roads watched by bright-plumed Roadwardens.
arrival_signals: Largest metropolis of Shelk and one of the major urban engines of the Principalities, defined by fashion, trade, refined civic order, and visible devotional plurality.
Travel rhythm changes as one crosses into the locality’s own rules, pace, and expectations.
